title: August 29th, 2022
body:
drugs and drama driving lyrics

human beings deal in drugs and drama to drive through things
you don't need to feel unclean
that's how we do things
but there's bad actors
not that they're evil
but you don't want them in your scenes
when you need reviews you can stomach to read
feedback that don't fuck your feedbag
yes and but not a yes man
a good actor invites you to change perspective
when that's closed off your just left with a script to contend with
until you can end it
and that ain't always simple
some symbols are long winded
some crash and some shimmer
some pop and some simmer
some locked i'm like who got the keys to my beamer
i want in there
i'm fine
i'm fine to drive
i understand you got your own life to consider
i ain't lyin
i can't walk the line
but it's got nothin to do with my condition
i can't walk
i'm goin too far
that's why i bought this vehicle
got out to stretch my [legs](legs)
but that don't mean i'm done with it
this trip is spiritual
i mean to see it through
you're not in my way
my world is spherical
my map is magical
i drive backwards
haven't had to look back yet
to make sure i'm clearing you
the road flies by
i read the lines
to steer into a future i can't see clearly but i'd love dearly to
and love that ain't always easy when i'm this near to you
white knucklin when i'm strugglin cuz there's nothing i hate more than runnin someone i love off the road
you got somewhere to go
and i don't know if it's there cuz i don't know what's coming
but that ain't my [problem](problem)
so it's not what i think about when i'm watching
honking cuz i want you to know i'm not in position to move outta your way
please be patient though, i wanna honor your pace
but i need to feel safe travelin
or the road starts unravelin
and i find myself back again
cuz human beings deal in drugs and drama to drive through things
